no_internet: Aap offline hain. Saved data dikha rahe hain. Kuch features limited ho sakte hain.
no_llm: AI assistant available nahi hai. Basic commands mein madad kar sakta hun.
fallback_response:
Main samajh nahi paya. Ye try karein:
• "Load Post" — naya load banane ke liye
• "Load Dhundho" — loads search karne ke liye
• "Meri Trips" — trips check karne ke liye
• "Navigate" — navigation shuru karne ke liye
fallback_response_voice: Samajh nahi aaya. Load post, load dhundho, ya status check bolein.
queued_action: Aapka action queue mein hai. Online hone par bhej diya jayega.
cached_data_notice: Saved data dikha rahe hain. Online hone par neeche kheenchein refresh ke liye.
reconnected: Wapas online! Data sync ho raha hai...
sync_failed: Kuch items sync nahi ho paye. Retry ke liye tap karein.
